9:I[4902,["972","static/chunks/972-f95eba36e5b3e2f0.js","712","static/chunks/712-e9f9c3e9efc235ab.js","185","static/chunks/app/layout-5f316b55a4cbfccc.js"],"AuthProvider"]
a:I[6731,["972","static/chunks/972-f95eba36e5b3e2f0.js","712","static/chunks/712-e9f9c3e9efc235ab.js","185","static/chunks/app/layout-5f316b55a4cbfccc.js"],"Navbar"]
4:T1291,<h2 class="text-2xl font-bold mt-12 mb-6 text-white">The Complete GEO Audit Checklist</h2><p class="text-gray-300 mb-6 leading-relaxed">AI engines evaluate medical practices using 47 distinct factors. This checklist covers every element that influences whether ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Claude recommend your practice.</p><h2 class="text-2xl font-bold mt-12 mb-6 text-white">Technical Foundation (Items 1-12)</h2><h3 class="text-xl font-semibold mt-8 mb-4 text-white">Schema Markup
- [ ] MedicalOrganization schema implemented
- [ ] Physician schema for each provider
- [ ] MedicalProcedure schemas for all services
- [ ] FAQPage schema on key pages
- [ ] HowTo schema for pre/post care
- [ ] Review/AggregateRating schema</h3><h3 class="text-xl font-semibold mt-8 mb-4 text-white">Local SEO
- [ ] Google Business Profile optimized
- [ ] NAP consistency across all directories
- [ ] Local business schema with geo coordinates
- [ ] Location-specific landing pages
- [ ] Medical directory listings</h3><h3 class="text-xl font-semibold mt-8 mb-4 text-white">Site Structure
- [ ] Clear services hierarchy
- [ ] Topic clusters implemented
- [ ] Internal linking strategy
- [ ] Mobile-first design
- [ ] Core Web Vitals optimized</h3><h2 class="text-2xl font-bold mt-12 mb-6 text-white">Content Authority (Items 13-27)</h2><h3 class="text-xl font-semibold mt-8 mb-4 text-white">Core Content
- [ ] 10+ deep-dive procedure guides
- [ ] 50+ FAQ pages with schema
- [ ] Before/after case studies
- [ ] Cost breakdown articles
- [ ] Comparison content
- [ ] Recovery timeline guides</h3><h3 class="text-xl font-semibold mt-8 mb-4 text-white">AI-Optimized Format
- [ ] Question-based headings
- [ ] Direct answers in first paragraph
- [ ] Structured data with statistics
- [ ] Citation of medical sources
- [ ] Bullet points and numbered lists
- [ ] Bold key terms and metrics</h3><h3 class="text-xl font-semibold mt-8 mb-4 text-white">Content Quality
- [ ] Medical accuracy verified
- [ ] Regular content updates
- [ ] E-E-A-T signals present
- [ ] Patient-friendly language
- [ ] Comprehensive coverage</h3><h2 class="text-2xl font-bold mt-12 mb-6 text-white">Authority Building (Items 28-37)</h2><h3 class="text-xl font-semibold mt-8 mb-4 text-white">Medical Forums
- [ ] RealSelf profile complete
- [ ] 50+ helpful answers on RealSelf
- [ ] Reddit presence (r/dentistry, etc.)
- [ ] Healthline/WebMD mentions
- [ ] Medical conference presentations</h3><h3 class="text-xl font-semibold mt-8 mb-4 text-white">Citations
- [ ] Board certification verified
- [ ] Professional directory listings
- [ ] Medical association memberships
- [ ] Published research cited
- [ ] Media mentions documented</h3><h2 class="text-2xl font-bold mt-12 mb-6 text-white">Trust Signals (Items 38-47)</h2><h3 class="text-xl font-semibold mt-8 mb-4 text-white">Reviews
- [ ] 100+ Google reviews
- [ ] 50+ RealSelf reviews
- [ ] Review response strategy
- [ ] Review schema markup
- [ ] Recent review velocity</h3><h3 class="text-xl font-semibold mt-8 mb-4 text-white">Transparency
- [ ] Pricing transparency
- [ ] Credential visibility
- [ ] Before/after galleries
- [ ] Office photos/videos
- [ ] Staff bios complete</h3><h2 class="text-2xl font-bold mt-12 mb-6 text-white">Scoring Your GEO Readiness</h2><p class="text-gray-300 mb-6 leading-relaxed"><strong class="text-white">0-15 points</strong>: Critical gaps—immediate action required  
<strong class="text-white">16-30 points</strong>: Foundation present—significant work needed  
<strong class="text-white">31-40 points</strong>: Good foundation—optimization phase  
<strong class="text-white">41-47 points</strong>: Excellent—maintenance and monitoring</p><h2 class="text-2xl font-bold mt-12 mb-6 text-white">Priority Action Items</h2><p class="text-gray-300 mb-6 leading-relaxed">If you're just starting, focus on these high-impact items first:</p><ol class="list-decimal list-inside space-y-2 text-gray-300 my-6 pl-4"><li>Implement MedicalOrganization schema</li><li>Create 5 core procedure guides</li><li>Optimize Google Business Profile</li><li>Establish RealSelf presence</li><li>Build 20 FAQ pages</li></ol><h2 class="text-2xl font-bold mt-12 mb-6 text-white">Tools for Audit</h2><ul class="list-disc list-inside space-y-2 text-gray-300 my-6 pl-4"><li>Google Rich Results Test</li><li>Schema.org Validator</li><li>PageSpeed Insights</li><li>RealSelf Doctor Finder</li><li>ChatGPT/Perplexity manual testing</li></ul><h2 class="text-2xl font-bold mt-12 mb-6 text-white">The Bottom Line</h2><p class="text-gray-300 mb-6 leading-relaxed">This checklist isn't theoretical—it's derived from analyzing 100+ medical practices and their AI visibility scores. Each unchecked item is a potential barrier to AI citation.</p>6:["id","geo-checklist","d"]
